text_excerpt: --> Latest | Paul Foster MP top of page Home About In Parliament Latest Contact Help and Support All Posts Campaigns In Parliament In the Constituency Policy Work Unfolding Situation in the Middle East People across South Ribble have been in touch with me over the past few days regarding the situation in Iran and the wider Middle East. I know that people are worried, especially those with family or friends in the region. Paul Foster Mar 6 1 min read Letter: Pause of ASD and ADHD support for children and young people The decision by Lancashire and South Cumbria NHS Foundation Trust to pause new referrals and halt progress on existing waiting lists for autism (ASD) and ADHD assessments for children and young people is deeply concerning to me. I share this concern with other Lancashire-based MPs, so I have joined them in writing to the Trust to raise our concerns. Paul Foster Feb 17 2 min read Appointment to serve the Defence Select Committee for the Armed Forces Bill I’m honoured to have been appointed to sit on the Select Committee scrutinising the new Armed Forces Bill, especially because it's a Bill I care deeply about. It matters profoundly to me because I understand first-hand what is at stake, and it’s a responsibility I will take extremely seriously. Paul Foster Feb 16 2 min read Runshaw Colleges' Question Time Thank you to the students at Runshaw College for the invitation to take part in their college Question Time panel last week. There was plenty of thoughtful discussion and lively debate. It’s genuinely refreshing to see so many politically engaged young people, and it’s fantastic that they’re given a platform to have their voices heard. Paul Foster Feb 6 1 min read Paul Foster Member of Parliament South Ribble Subscribe to my newsletter Email * Next I want to subscribe to your mailing list. paul.foster.mp@parliament.uk 01772 364003 Unit 1a, Balfour Court, Leyland, Lancashire PR25 2TF bottom of page
